v.1
Lesson 4 Summary Guide
 To build your list, you essentially need three things:
o Squeeze page
o Irresistible bribe
o Multiple traffic sources
 Decide first which niche you will build your list in (this is critical!)
 A couple options for finding your niche:
o Publish about what you love
o Research and uncover potentially profitable markets to
publish in
 Conduct some “niche” research
 Google your “niche” and see what websites and products come
up in your search
 Look for advertisers for your niche (Google Adwords)
o Lots of Google Advertisers will indicate an active market
o Find out who the competitors are and what they are
paying for Google Adwords
o Check out the cool research tools in the “Downloads”
area
 Go to magazines in your niche (if possible)
